name: excel-anonymizer-uv
description: Excel anonymizer/deanonymizer tool — UV-managed Python project
displayDescription: CLI tool to anonymize and deanonymize multi-sheet Excel files with consistent fake-value mapping. Essential for researchers and admins sharing student data (MSSV, CMND, names) while preserving privacy compliance. Works by generating consistent fake values and exporting a mapping CSV for reversible anonymization. Contains a Python CLI with openpyxl and pandas. Managed with uv package manager. v0.4.2.
